# Pagesmith - Full LLM Reference

Pagesmith is a filesystem-first content toolkit organized as a multi-package workspace under the `@pagesmith/` npm scope.

## Packages

- `@pagesmith/core`: shared content/runtime layer with collections, loaders, markdown pipeline (Expressive Code), validation, JSX runtime, CSS builder, `z` re-export, runtime CSS exports, and Vite plugins (`pagesmithContent`, `pagesmithSsg`)
- `@pagesmith/docs`: convention-based documentation built on `@pagesmith/core` with the docs CLI, nav/sidebar generation from `content/`, bundled Pagefind search, a default theme, and fixed layout override slots

## Core APIs

### Configuration
- `defineCollection(def)` — type-safe collection definition with Zod schema inference
- `defineCollections(map)` — define multiple collections with strong literal inference
- `defineConfig(config)` — type-safe `ContentLayerConfig`

### Content Layer
- `createContentLayer(config)` — returns a `ContentLayer` backed by `ContentStore`
- `layer.getCollection(name)` — load all entries in a collection
- `layer.getEntry(collection, slug)` — get a single entry by slug
- `layer.convert(markdown, options?)` — convert raw markdown outside collections
- `layer.validate(collection?)` — run all validators
- `layer.invalidate(collection, slug)` / `invalidateCollection(name)` / `invalidateAll()` — cache busting

### Content Entry
- `entry.slug` / `entry.collection` / `entry.filePath` / `entry.data` / `entry.rawContent`
- `entry.render(options?)` → `{ html, headings, readTime }` — lazy, cached
- `entry.clearRenderCache()` — force re-render

### Vite Plugins
- `pagesmithContent(collections, options?)` — virtual module plugin for framework integration
- `pagesmithSsg(options?)` — SSG plugin with dev server, Pagefind, and asset handling

### Markdown
- `processMarkdown(raw, config?, preExtracted?)` → `{ html, headings, frontmatter }`
- Pipeline: remark-parse → remark-gfm → remark-math → remark-frontmatter → remark-github-alerts → remark-smartypants → remark-rehype → rehype-expressive-code → rehype-mathjax → rehype-slug → rehype-autolink-headings → rehype-external-links → rehype-accessible-emojis → rehype-stringify
- Expressive Code handles: syntax highlighting (dual themes), code frames, line numbers, file titles, copy button, line highlighting (mark/ins/del), collapsible sections, text wrapping
- GitHub alerts: `> [!NOTE]`, `> [!TIP]`, `> [!IMPORTANT]`, `> [!WARNING]`, `> [!CAUTION]`
- External links automatically get `target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"`
- Emoji characters wrapped in accessible `<span role="img" aria-label="...">` elements
- Smart typography: "curly quotes", em—dashes, el…lipses

### Schemas
- `BaseFrontmatterSchema` — title, description, publishedDate, lastUpdatedOn, tags, draft
- `BlogFrontmatterSchema` — extends base with category, featured, coverImage
- `ProjectFrontmatterSchema` — extends base with gitRepo, links
- `HeadingSchema` — depth, text, slug
- `MarkdownConfigSchema` — remarkPlugins, rehypePlugins, shiki (themes, defaultShowLineNumbers)
- `z` re-exported from Zod for convenience

### Validation
- `builtinMarkdownValidators` — linkValidator, headingValidator, codeBlockValidator
- `runValidators(ctx, validators)` — execute validators against content
- Custom validators: implement `ContentValidator { name, validate(ctx) }`

### Loaders
- `MarkdownLoader` (.md), `JsonLoader` (.json), `JsoncLoader` (.json, .jsonc), `YamlLoader` (.yml, .yaml), `TomlLoader` (.toml)
- Custom: implement `Loader { name, kind, extensions, load(filePath) }`

### JSX Runtime
- `h(tag, props, ...children)` / `Fragment` / `HtmlString`
- Configure: `"jsxImportSource": "@pagesmith/core"` in tsconfig.json

### CSS
- `buildCss(entryPath, { minify? })` — LightningCSS bundler

### Runtime Exports
- `getRuntimeCSS()` / `getRuntimeJS()` — standalone tier (full site)
- `getContentCSS()` / `getContentJS()` — content tier (markdown only)
- `getViewportCSS()` / `getViewportCSSPath()` — responsive base

### CSS Export Paths
- `@pagesmith/core/css/content` — prose + inline code styles
- `@pagesmith/core/css/standalone` — full layout + prose
- `@pagesmith/core/css/viewport` — responsive viewport base
- `@pagesmith/core/css/fonts` — bundled Open Sans + JetBrains Mono fonts

### AI Assistant Artifacts
- `installAiArtifacts(options)` — generate assistant files
- `getAiArtifacts(options)` / `getAiArtifactContent(assistant, kind, options)`
- Supports: Claude, Codex, Gemini
- Generates: CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md, skills, llms.txt, llms-full.txt

## Docs Package APIs

- `build(options?)` — build static docs site
- `startDev(options?)` — development server with hot reload
- `preview(options?)` — preview built site
- `defineDocsConfig(config)` — type-safe docs config
- CLI: `pagesmith dev`, `pagesmith build`, `pagesmith preview`

### Docs Config (pagesmith.config.json5)
- `name`, `title`, `description`, `origin`, `language`
- `contentDir`, `outDir`, `publicDir`, `basePath`
- `footerLinks`, `search`, `theme`, `analytics`, `markdown`
- `theme.layouts` — override `home`, `page`, `notFound` with custom TSX components

### Layout Overrides
- Props: `content`, `frontmatter`, `headings`, `slug`, `site`
- Page layout gets: `sidebarSections`, `prev`, `next`
- Use `@pagesmith/core/jsx-runtime` for TSX
- Export: `default` or named export matching layout name

## Export Map

| Import path | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `@pagesmith/core` | Main API barrel |
| `@pagesmith/core/jsx-runtime` | h, Fragment, HtmlString |
| `@pagesmith/core/markdown` | processMarkdown |
| `@pagesmith/core/css` | buildCss (LightningCSS) |
| `@pagesmith/core/css/content` | Content CSS file |
| `@pagesmith/core/css/standalone` | Standalone CSS file |
| `@pagesmith/core/css/viewport` | Viewport CSS file |
| `@pagesmith/core/css/fonts` | Bundled font faces |
| `@pagesmith/core/schemas` | Zod schemas and types |
| `@pagesmith/core/loaders` | Loader classes and registry |
| `@pagesmith/core/assets` | Asset copying and hashing |
| `@pagesmith/core/runtime` | Pre-built CSS/JS accessors |
| `@pagesmith/core/ai` | AI assistant file installer |
| `@pagesmith/core/vite` | Vite plugins (pagesmithContent, pagesmithSsg) |
| `@pagesmith/core/create` | Project scaffolding |
